item.title: National Zoo draws huge crowds on Eid day
item.description: Despite a cloudy sky and intermittent drizzles on Eid day, a massive influx of visitors was seen at the Bangladesh National Zoo in the Mirpur area of Dhaka. People of all ages thronged the zoo premises with their families....Bangladeshi culture blog

item.title: 10 injured as rival groups clash in Faridpur on Eid day
item.description: At least 10 people were injured in a clash between two rival groups in Faridpur’s Bhanga upazila on Eid day, the police and local sources said.......

item.title: Eid-ul-Fitr celebrated across Bangladesh
item.description: Eid-ul-Fitr, one of the largest religious festivals of Muslims, was celebrated across Bangladesh on Saturday with due religious fervour and gaiety.......Bangladeshi culture blog

item.title: Bangladesh president, PM offer Eid prayers at National Eidgah
item.description: Bangladesh president Mohammed Shahabuddin and prime minister Tarique Rahman offered Eid-ul-Fitr prayers at the country’s main congregation at the National Eidgah on Saturday morning....Local business directory

item.title: 4 children dead, two missing in Jamalpur bridge collapse
item.description: Four children died and at least two others remain missing after a floating bridge on a branch of the Brahmaputra River collapsed in Dewanganj upazila of Jamalpur district on Saturday afternoon.......

item.title: Iran threat to Hormuz ‘degraded’: US military
item.description: Admiral Brad Cooper, commander of US Central Command, said that it dropped multiple 5,000-pound bombs on a ‘hardened’ underground facility along Iran coast used to store missiles and other equipment…...

item.title: Iran Guards say targeted Israeli F-16 jet over country’s centre
item.description: Iran’s Revolutionary Guards said on Saturday they had targeted an Israeli F-16 fighter jet over the country’s centre......

item.title: Two killed in road accidents in Ctg, Gopalganj
item.description: At least two people were killed in separate road accidents in Gopalganj and Chattogram districts on Saturday......

item.title: 13 European nations, Canada decry ‘increasing settler terror’ in West Bank
item.description: ‘We strongly condemn increasing settler terror and violence by the Israeli security forces inflicted upon Palestinian communities,’ said a joint statement from the diplomatic missions of countries including France, Spain and Britain......

item.title: 11 killed, dozens injured in South Korea car plant fire
item.description: Rescuers combed the charred wreckage of a South Korean car parts factory for missing people after a fire killed at least 11 and injured dozens more, authorities told AFP on Saturday......

item.title: Bangladesh signs 5th country programme framework with IAEA
item.description: Bangladesh has signed its Fifth Country Programme Framework with the International Atomic Energy Agency for the period 2026–2032, marking a significant step in strengthening technical cooperation in the peaceful use of nuclear technology......Bangladeshi culture blog

item.title: Iran targets joint US-UK Diego Garcia base
item.description: Diego Garcia, which is around 4,000km from Iranian territory, is one of the two bases the UK has allowed the United States to use for ‘defensive operations’ in its war on Iran......

item.title: Iran targets joint US-UK base Diego Garcia base
item.description: Diego Garcia, which is around 4,000km from Iranian territory, is one of the two bases the UK has allowed the United States to use for ‘defensive operations’ in its war on Iran......

item.title: Eid Jamaat held at Sholakia Eidgah
item.description: Hundreds of thousands of people on Saturday offered their Eid prayers at the country's largest and most historic Sholakia Eidgah with discipline and security......

item.title: Japan edge Australia to win Women’s Asian Cup
item.description: Maika Hamano scored the only goal as a formidable Japan battled past Australia to clinch a third Women’s Asian Cup title on Saturday in front of a record-breaking crowd in Sydney......

item.title: Bangladesh seeks $2bn loan from multilateral agencies
item.description: Bangladesh is seeking around $2 billion in loans from multilateral agencies to address energy security concerns amid soaring global fuel prices driven by the Mideast war....Bangladeshi culture blog

item.title: UN atomic watchdog calls for restraint after attack on Iran nuclear site
item.description: The UN atomic watchdog on Saturday said it was looking into a report by Iran that the Natanz nuclear site was attacked by the United States and Israel....

item.title: K-pop kings BTS rock Seoul in comeback concert
item.description: South Korean megastars BTS reunited on Saturday for their first show in nearly four years, blowing away enormous crowds in Seoul for a K-pop extravaganza livestreamed to millions more worldwide......

item.title: Schoolboy stabbed dead at Hatirjheel
item.description: A schoolboy was stabbed to death in Hatirjheel’s Madhubagh area in Dhaka while hanging out with friends on the eve of Eid-ul-Fitr.......

item.title: PM exchanges Eid greetings with cross section of people
item.description: Prime minister Tarique Rahman on Saturday exchanged greetings with people from all walks of life, including foreign diplomats and educationists, on the occasion of the Eid-ul-Fitr.......

item.title: Jamaat chief exchanges Eid greetings with diplomats
item.description: Jamaat-e-Islami amir Shafiqur Rahman exchanged Eid greetings and good wishes with diplomats from various diplomatic missions in Dhaka on Saturday......

item.title: One killed in drone attack against Iraqi intelligence services in Baghdad
item.description: An Iraqi officer was killed on Saturday after drone struck an Iintelligence services building in a residential Baghdad neighbourhood, the agency said, as the Middle East war reverberates across the country....

item.title: PM Tarique Rahman offers prayers at his parents’ graves
item.description: Prime minister Tarique Rahman on Saturday offered prayers at the graves of his father, late president Ziaur Rahman, and his mother, former prime minister Khaleda Zia, on the occasion of Eid-ul-Fitr.......

item.title: PM calls for collective efforts to build desired Bangladesh
item.description: Prime minister Tarique Rahman today called for collective efforts, irrespective of party affiliation and opinion to build a Bangladesh that meets people’s expectations.......Bangladeshi culture blog

item.title: Iran warns UAE over disputed Gulf islands
item.description: Iran’s military warned the United Arab Emirates on Saturday against allowing its territory to be used for attacks on two disputed Gulf islands near the Strait of Hormuz....

item.title: Iranians celebrate Eid amid Natanz strike, Trump considers winding down war
item.description: Thousands of Iranians held Eid-ul-Fitr prayers on Saturday to mark the end of the Ramadan fast amid war with the United States and Israel, which reportedly carried out a strike on Iran’s Natanz nuclear site....

item.title: US, Israel attack Natanz nuclear facility in Iran
item.description: ‘Following the criminal attacks by the United States and the usurping Zionist regime ... Natanz enrichment complex was targeted this morning,’ Iran’s atomic energy organisation said......

item.title: Iranians hold Eid prayers amid ME war
item.description: Thousands of Muslims held Eid-ul-Fitr prayers in Iran on Saturday to mark the end of the Ramadan fast amid the Middle East war, state television footage showed....

item.title: Iranians hold Eid prayers as ME war rages
item.description: Thousands of Muslims held Eid-ul-Fitr prayers in Iran on Saturday to mark the end of the Ramadan fast against the backdrop of the Middle East war, state television footage showed....

item.title: Eid-ul-fitr being celebrated across Bangladesh
item.description: Muslims across Bangladesh are celebrating Eid-ul-Fitr, one of the biggest religious festivals of Muslims, today with due solemnity, a spirit of sacrifice, and religious fervour....Local business directory

item.title: Eid-ul-fitr being celebrated across Bangladesh
item.description: Muslims across Bangladesh are celebrating Eid-ul-Fitr, one of the biggest religious festivals of Muslims, today with due solemnity, a spirit of sacrifice, and religious fervour....Local business directory
